summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P1 features for Bilingual Tax Office CRM Portal including Forgot Password flow, SMS status endpoint, and Brand Settings Domain verification with DNS instructions
passed_tests: Backend API health check (100% success rate)
Forgot Password endpoint (/api/auth/forgot-password) - accepts email and returns success message
SMS Status endpoint (/api/sms/status) - returns configuration status (Twilio not configured but endpoint functional)
Domain Settings endpoints (/api/domain-settings) - GET/PUT/POST verification all working
Login page loads with Forgot Password link
Forgot Password page navigation (/portal/forgot-password) works correctly
Forgot Password form submission shows success message after email submission
Reset Password page (/portal/reset-password) loads with token parameter and shows proper form fields
Admin login successful with provided credentials (admin@taxoffice.com / admin123)
Brand Settings page accessible via sidebar navigation (/portal/brand)
Domain tab in Brand Settings loads and functions properly
Custom domain input field accepts values and saves
DNS Instructions section displays CNAME record details correctly
Domain verification button triggers verification process
Professional dark navy + gold design theme maintained throughout
